title: lomelosia graminifolia subsp. graminifolia
intro: Lomelosia graminifolia subsp. graminifolia, also known as the Alpeastrum or Yellow Flowered Lomelosia, is a plant species within the Boraginaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Lomelosia graminifolia subsp. graminifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form.
